name: infinite-monitor-desktop
description: Desktop application for Infinite Monitor – AI-powered dashboard builder

scripts.build: node scripts/build-settings-renderer.js && node scripts/apply-overlay.js && pnpm run generate-icons && node scripts/prepare-node.js && pnpm run prepare-web && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.build:mac: node scripts/build-settings-renderer.js && node scripts/apply-overlay.js && pnpm run generate-icons && node scripts/prepare-node.js && pnpm run prepare-web && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.build:mac:signed: pnpm run mac:preflight:direct && node scripts/build-settings-renderer.js && node scripts/apply-overlay.js && pnpm run generate-icons && node scripts/prepare-node.js && pnpm run prepare-web && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml -c.mac.notarize=true --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.build:mac:store: pnpm run mac:preflight:store && node scripts/build-settings-renderer.js && node scripts/apply-overlay.js && pnpm run generate-icons && node scripts/prepare-node.js && pnpm run prepare-web && electron-builder --config electron-builder.store.yml --mac mas --publish never
scripts.build:mac:store:dev: pnpm run mac:preflight:store-dev && node scripts/build-settings-renderer.js && node scripts/apply-overlay.js && pnpm run generate-icons && node scripts/prepare-node.js && pnpm run prepare-web && electron-builder --config electron-builder.store-dev.yml --mac mas-dev --publish never
scripts.build:win: node scripts/build-settings-renderer.js && node scripts/apply-overlay.js && pnpm run generate-icons && node scripts/prepare-node.js && pnpm run prepare-web && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.build:linux: node scripts/build-settings-renderer.js && node scripts/apply-overlay.js && pnpm run generate-icons && node scripts/prepare-node.js && pnpm run prepare-web && electron-builder --linux --publish never
